verse.name: v1
verse.lines: God only knows how I've cried Heartbroken and my hands are tied But He's been faithful time and time again And although I don't know how it ends

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: There's peace in trusting the Lord Peace when my faith and fear are at war, So I don't have to worry, He knows what's in store And there's peace in trusting the Lord There is peace in trusting the Lord

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: If His will should not go my way If the answer is not what I've prayed Then I'll trust Him for what I can't see 'Cause I know He knows what's best for me.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: There's peace in trusting the Lord, Peace when my faith and fear are at war, So I don't have to worry, He knows what's in store, And there's peace in trusting the Lord, There is peace, peace, peace in trusting the Lord.
